description: Fix identified bugs and implement missing features: keyboard shortcut wiring, task checkbox interactivity, relative image path resolution, and async file I/O

userStories.title: Wire Ctrl+/ keyboard shortcut for view mode toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I want to press Ctrl+/ (or Cmd+/ on macOS) to toggle between WYSIWYG and source modes, so I don't need to click the toolbar button.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a keymap extension to MarkFlowEditor.tsx that binds Ctrl+/ and Mod+/ to trigger view mode toggle
MarkFlowEditor.tsx accepts an optional onToggleMode callback prop
App.tsx passes the toggleMode handler to MarkFlowEditor via the new prop
Pressing Ctrl+/ in the editor calls onToggleMode
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-04-10. `MarkFlowEditor` now accepts `onToggleMode`, binds `Mod-/`, and `App` passes the toggle handler. Verified by `packages/editor/src/editor/__tests__/MarkFlowEditor.test.tsx`, `packages/editor/src/__tests__/App.test.tsx`, plus full lint/test/build and harness smoke runs.

userStories.title: Implement task checkbox click-to-toggle in markdown source
userStories.description: As a user, I want to click a rendered checkbox in WYSIWYG mode to toggle it between checked and unchecked, so I can manage task lists without switching to source mode.
acceptanceCriteria: CheckboxWidget in packages/editor/src/editor/decorations/listDecoration.ts handles click events
Clicking an unchecked checkbox dispatches a CodeMirror transaction replacing '[ ]' with '[x]' at the widget's source position
Clicking a checked checkbox dispatches a transaction replacing '[x]' with '[ ]' at the widget's source position
The markdown source updates immediately after click
Checkbox toggle only works in WYSIWYG mode (decorations are only active in WYSIWYG mode, so this is naturally enforced)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-04-10. Rendered task-list checkboxes now toggle `[ ]` and `[x]` directly in the markdown source via CodeMirror transactions in WYSIWYG mode. Verified by `packages/editor/src/editor/__tests__/listAndBlockquoteDecoration.test.tsx` and full repo verification.

userStories.title: Resolve relative image paths against document file path
userStories.description: As a user, I want images with relative paths (e.g., ./assets/diagram.png) to display correctly when a file is open in the desktop app, so my local images render in WYSIWYG mode.
acceptanceCriteria: MarkFlowEditor.tsx accepts an optional filePath prop (string | undefined)
App.tsx passes currentDoc.filePath to MarkFlowEditor
buildLinkDecorations in linkDecoration.ts accepts an optional filePath parameter
When filePath is set and an image src is relative (starts with ./ or ../ or lacks a protocol), the src is resolved to an absolute file:// URL using the document directory and the relative image path
Images with absolute URLs (http://, https://, file://) are unaffected
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-04-10. `filePath` now flows from `App` into image decorations so relative image sources resolve to `file://` URLs while protocol URLs stay unchanged. Verified by `packages/editor/src/editor/__tests__/linkDecoration.test.tsx`, `packages/editor/src/__tests__/App.test.tsx`, and full repo verification.

userStories.title: Convert desktop file write operations to async
userStories.description: As a developer, I want file save operations to use async I/O so the Electron main process event loop is not blocked during file writes.
acceptanceCriteria: packages/desktop/src/main/fileManager.ts replaces fs.writeFileSync calls with await fs.promises.writeFile
IPC handlers that call writeFile are updated to async and return the resolved result to the renderer
The save and saveAs IPC handlers still return { success: true } or { success: false, error: string } to the renderer
Existing desktop tests in externalLinks.test.ts still pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Completed on 2026-04-10. Desktop save and save-as now use `fs.promises.writeFile`, return `MarkFlowSaveResult`, and keep failure handling structured without corrupting the active file path on failed save-as writes. Verified by `packages/desktop/src/main/fileManager.test.ts`, `packages/desktop/src/main/externalLinks.test.ts`, and full lint/test/build/harness smoke runs.
